items.title: Marvell’s Stock Soars On Data Center Forecast
items.description: The chip maker said it’s seeing strong demand in its data center business. The company now expects revenue in the segment to grow 25% next year.

items.title: CrowdStrike Stock Wavers on Solid Earnings
items.description: Cybersecurity standout,  CrowdStrike Holdings  reported strong third-quarter earnings results Tuesday afternoon.  Adjusted earnings-per-share were 96 cents, ahead of Wall Street’s consensus estimate of 94 cents, up from 76 cents last year.  Fourth-quarter guidance for sales, adjusted EPS, and adjusted operating income also exceeded expectations.

items.title: System Solutions LLC Released ShipRush Integration for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
items.description: GLASTONBURY, Conn., Dec. 02, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- System Solutions LLC announced the release of a powerful new integration connecting Descartes ShipRush with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central cloud ERP software. This integration enables manufacturers, distributors, wholesalers and retailers to streamline their 365 Business Central shipping and tracking process.
